_comment: CSS filter strings to tint black icons. Use 'invert' for white, or custom filter for brand colors.
_howto: Apply via style={{ filter: iconTints.navbar.active }} on elements.

mobileBottomNav.active: invert(32%) sepia(98%) saturate(7494%) hue-rotate(349deg) brightness(98%) contrast(116%)

adminSidebar.active: invert(32%) sepia(98%) saturate(7494%) hue-rotate(349deg) brightness(98%) contrast(116%)

cartPage.delete: invert(32%) sepia(98%) saturate(7494%) hue-rotate(349deg) brightness(98%) contrast(116%)

checkoutPage.location: invert(32%) sepia(98%) saturate(7494%) hue-rotate(349deg) brightness(98%) contrast(116%)

adminMenu.edit: brightness(0) saturate(100%) invert(56%) sepia(75%) saturate(456%) hue-rotate(177deg) brightness(97%) contrast(93%)
adminMenu.delete: invert(32%) sepia(98%) saturate(7494%) hue-rotate(349deg) brightness(98%) contrast(116%)

adminOffers.delete: invert(32%) sepia(98%) saturate(7494%) hue-rotate(349deg) brightness(98%) contrast(116%)

adminStaff.delete: invert(32%) sepia(98%) saturate(7494%) hue-rotate(349deg) brightness(98%) contrast(116%)

profilePage.edit: invert(32%) sepia(98%) saturate(7494%) hue-rotate(349deg) brightness(98%) contrast(116%)

settingsPage.logout: invert(32%) sepia(98%) saturate(7494%) hue-rotate(349deg) brightness(98%) contrast(116%)
